/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/Jets_Bot.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Jets_Bot.dir/subsystems/drivetrain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Jets_Bot.dir/subsystems/ESPRadio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Jets_Bot.dir/subsystems/relayBoard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Jets_Bot.dir/subsystems/customCANutil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Jets_Bot.dir/subsystems/MPU6050util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Jets_Bot.dir/commands/MOVE_CMD/driveCMDs.cpp.o -o bin/Jets_Bot  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jjh/Bot_Code/lib/x86-64 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 -lwiringPi -li2c /home/jjh/Bot_Code/lib/x86-64/libCTRE_Phoenix.so /home/jjh/Bot_Code/lib/x86-64/libCTRE_PhoenixCCI.so /home/jjh/Bot_Code/lib/x86-64/libCTRE_PhoenixTools.so
